patterns_discovered.evidence: Phase 2 validation depends on Phase 1 test creation; max_parallel_phases: 1
patterns_discovered.impact: Enforces waterfall validation - new tests must pass before full suite validation

patterns_discovered.evidence: 355 tests across 5 harness groups (323 unit + 4 integration harnesses + 1 serve_smoke)
patterns_discovered.impact: Full suite validation verifies integration does not break existing functionality
Role-based execution with plan validation before code execution

patterns_discovered.evidence: build-progress.txt appended with session summaries; plan.json status fields updated
patterns_discovered.impact: Session history preserved in artifact files for audit trail

gotchas_discovered.mitigation: 323 unit tests + 4 integration harnesses counted separately to prevent accounting confusion
gotchas_discovered.lesson: Verify test count source when aggregating across harness patterns

gotchas_discovered.details: New test file added but validated immediately - 1 test passed in full suite confirms integration
gotchas_discovered.lesson: New harness tests must be verified in full suite run, not isolation

approach_outcome.objective: Run cargo test for all tests as Phase 2 validation step
approach_outcome.execution_summary: cargo test -p bop executed successfully; 355 tests passed across all harnesses

recommendations.rationale: cargo test only validates functionality; make check adds clippy + rustfmt validation required for merge acceptance
355 tests across 5 harnesses requires clear documentation for QA signoff; acceptance criteria requires result.md artifact
Integration test spawns background server process; single test pass in full suite insufficient to confirm stability; recommend run-multiple-times check
323 unit tests + 32 harness tests = large suite; recommend regex or pattern-based categorization for future scaling
